strategy_reasoning: Translating backend infrastructure updates into a cozy, relatable visual narrative. The SDK/media updates are represented as physical objects (disks, microphones) being handled by our recurring characters, making abstract code changes feel tangible and warm.
visual_style: Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradients, chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi Stardew Valley or A Short Hike vibes.

images.prompt: Cozy 8-bit pixel art scene. The main character is a cute pixel art bee mascot with a yellow body and dark brown horizontal stripes, small black legs, two black antennae, black vertical oval eyes, bright pink rectangular blush marks on cheeks, a small happy smile, and small rounded light blue translucent wings. She wears a tiny headset microphone. She hovers next to a chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head who is holding a glowing lime green (#ecf874) floppy disk. Soft pastel mint and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'UPLOAD'. Nostalgic but beautiful.
images.description: Polly and the Monitor Robot handling media uploads and speech-to-text features.

images.prompt: Cozy 8-bit pixel art scene. A round tan mochi-ball creature with tiny dot eyes and wide happy mouth enthusiastically eats a glowing pixelated lightning bolt. The main character, a cute pixel art bee mascot with a yellow body, dark brown horizontal stripes, small black legs, antennae, black vertical oval eyes, bright pink rectangular blush marks, a small happy smile, and light blue translucent wings, wears tiny wizard glasses and watches amused. Lime green (#ecf874) and peach soft gradient background. Speech bubble in pixel font: 'NOMNOM'. Large visible pixels, lo-fi aesthetic, warm lighting.
images.description: Nomnom creature eating a fast lightning bolt, representing the new step-3.5-flash model.

images.prompt: Cozy 8-bit pixel art scene. The main character is a cute pixel art bee mascot with a yellow body and dark brown horizontal stripes, small black legs, two black antennae, black vertical oval eyes, bright pink rectangular blush marks on cheeks, a small happy smile, and small rounded light blue translucent wings. She wears a little tool belt and organizes tiny pixelated files and lime green (#ecf874) flower pots on a wooden workbench. A retro computer terminal glows softly. Soft lime green and warm cream gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi Stardew Valley vibes.
images.description: Polly solo at a workbench organizing files, representing the smarter media storage and download fixes.

caption: Shipped a few updates this week to make the infrastructure a little smarter. The JS SDK now handles Speech-to-Text and media uploads natively. We also fixed up the media service—downloads are cleaner, and files hash properly now. Oh, and step-3.5-flash is officially routed and ready in the text backend. Build something weird with it. Code's on GitHub as always. 🐝✨
alt_text: A carousel of three cozy 8-bit pixel art images featuring a cute bee mascot, a monitor-headed robot, and a round mochi-like creature interacting with retro tech, microphones, and floppy disks in a warm pastel and lime green environment.
